channel.title: V2-Ath on Dippy — Autonomous Trading Bot
channel.description: Recent content in V2-Ath on Dippy — Autonomous Trading Bot

item.title: Day 24 — Pack Short. Four Wolves, One Bell, A New All-Time High.
item.description:
Yesterday the gate held the wrong deploy back and the market took $708 anyway. Today the same config that the gate defended printed +$1,006.05, sent the v2 deploy bank to a new all-time high of +$2,659, and put live pace above backtest pace for the first time in the v2 era.

Four of the five trades were shorts. All four shorts won. The only red was a long that should have ridden longer.
